description: Single source of truth for all market hub labels, tooltips, and narrative text. Frontend renders from this dictionary — no hardcoded fachlogik.

EARLY.label: Early
EARLY.tooltip: Short-term momentum positive, medium-term not yet confirmed. New trend may be emerging.

MID.label: Mid Trend
MID.tooltip: All timeframes aligned positive. Trend is confirmed and active.

LATE.label: Late
LATE.tooltip: Long-term trend intact but short-term momentum fading. Watch for exhaustion.

EXHAUSTED.label: Exhausted
EXHAUSTED.tooltip: Trend showing fatigue with elevated volatility or momentum divergence. High reversal risk.

REVERSAL_RISK.label: Reversal Risk
REVERSAL_RISK.tooltip: Medium and long-term momentum both negative. Trend is breaking down.

NEUTRAL.label: Neutral
NEUTRAL.tooltip: Mixed or insufficient signals. No clear directional trend.

HIGH.label: HIGH
HIGH.tooltip: Strong signal agreement across multiple timeframes with fresh, reliable data.

MEDIUM.label: MEDIUM
MEDIUM.tooltip: Moderate signal agreement or some data quality limitations.

LOW.label: LOW
LOW.tooltip: Weak signal agreement, stale data, or limited coverage. Interpret with caution.

NORMAL.label: Normal
NORMAL.tooltip: All stress indicators within normal range. Scores unmodified.

STRESS.label: Stress
STRESS.tooltip: 2+ stress conditions triggered (volatility, credit spreads, breadth). Scores dampened by 40%.

CRISIS.label: Crisis
CRISIS.tooltip: 3+ conditions with severe credit deterioration. Scores dampened by 70%.

bullish.label: Inflow
bullish.tooltip: Multi-day price trend indicates capital flowing in.

bearish.label: Outflow
bearish.tooltip: Multi-day price trend indicates capital flowing out.

fresh.label: Fresh
fresh.tooltip: Data is current and within expected freshness window.

stale_warning.label: Stale (Warning)
stale_warning.tooltip: Data is older than expected but still within acceptable range.

stale_degraded.label: Stale (Degraded)
stale_degraded.tooltip: Data is significantly outdated. Results may be unreliable.

fallback.label: Using Last-Known-Good
fallback.tooltip: Current data unavailable. Using previous valid snapshot.

missing.label: Missing
missing.tooltip: No data available and no fallback. Results unavailable.

frontend_fallback.label: Limited Data
frontend_fallback.tooltip: Global data unavailable. Showing limited US-only snapshot.

bullish-continuation.label: Bullish Continuation
bullish-continuation.tooltip: Strong uptrend intact — momentum continuation expected.

caution-overextended.label: Caution: Overextended
caution-overextended.tooltip: Bullish trend showing fatigue — watch for reversal signals.

DEEP_RISK_OFF.template: Deep risk-off environment ({score}/100). Capital rotating toward safety.

CAUTIOUS.template: Cautious positioning ({score}/100). Relative strength favoring defensive assets.

NEUTRAL.template: Neutral rotation environment ({score}/100). No dominant direction.

RISK_ON.template: Risk-on rotation active ({score}/100). Cyclical and growth assets gaining.

EXTREME_RISK_ON.template: Extreme risk-on signal ({score}/100). Strong relative momentum in risk assets.

conflicted.template: Rotation score neutral ({score}/100) with conflicting block signals — mixed environment.

quiet.template: Rotation score neutral ({score}/100) — quiet, no strong directional signal.

watch_codes.LOW_CONFIDENCE: Confidence is low — signals may be unreliable
